name: @saihm/client-pro
description: Post-quantum (ML-DSA-65 / ML-KEM-768) client-side cryptography for SAIHM non-custodial agent memory — your keys never leave the client: per-cell AES-256-GCM, provable crypto-shred erasure (GDPR Art. 17), authenticated sharing with one-step revoke. One cell, many shapes (polymorphic). One memory layer for fleet-scale swarms of many agents — homogeneous or disparate — portable across every LLM client and surviving any single vendor's product changes. Pairs with @saihm/mcp-server-pro (the production sealing thin-client). Join the protocol at saihm.coti.global.

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm test

author: SAIHM
